title: Set of 2 Multipurpose Plastic Buckets with Lids & Metal Handles – 7L Storage Containers, Durable & Robust, Ideal for Cleaning, Organizing, and Home Use, Strong & Long-Lasting Design
features: Multipurpose Design: Perfect for storage, cleaning, organizing, and more.
Durable Construction: Made from strong plastic for long-lasting use.
Secure Lids: Protect contents from dust, dirt, and spills.
Metal Handles: Sturdy carry handles with a comfortable grip for easy portability.
Compact Size: 7-litre capacity, ideal for versatile everyday use.
description: Simplify your storage and cleaning tasks with this Set of 2 Multipurpose Plastic Buckets. With a 7-litre capacity each, these buckets are perfect for organizing, storing, or carrying items around the home, garden, or workplace. The durable plastic construction is both strong and robust, while the metal handles with comfortable grips ensure easy transportation. Each bucket includes a secure-fitting lid to keep contents protected, making them versatile for cleaning, organizing tools, or storing liquids and dry goods.
